author: anon-59ff128d
content: Fixed: Added use_tabs: bool field to Op::Dedent with #[serde(default)] for backward compatibility. Updated dedent_line() to strip tabs when use_tabs is true. Updated all construction/match sites across operation.rs, engine.rs, script.rs, file_mode.rs. Added 4 new tests (tab dedent basic, partial, does-not-remove-spaces, and indent-then-dedent tab roundtrip). All 499 workspace tests pass.
